ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: (ISPICKVAL(Eligibility_Type__c, "Survivor from the 7.10 party taking part in a recognized rehabilitation program") || ISPICKVAL(Eligibility_Type__c, "Victims of hostilities recognized by Bituach Leumi for eligibility of 20% or more- physical disability and/or 20% or more - mental disability")) && ISBLANK( TEXT(BL_Eligibility_Type__c ) ) && CreatedDate > NOW()
